matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU Hough plate 41 prints OSTRYA VIRGINICA / Hop-Hornbeam and labels the middle specimen RADIAL SECTION. Kew Plants of the World Online documents Ostrya virginica as a synonym of Ostrya virginiana subsp. virginiana.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at the derived native crop resolution. The exposed radial wood face fills the frame with wavy horizontal bands and fine ray figure; no tree, bark, leaves, furniture, product scene, or microscopy appears.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries

matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: NCSU Hough plate 41 prints OSTRYA VIRGINICA / Hop-Hornbeam and labels the lower specimen TANGENTIAL SECTION. Kew documents this historical name as a synonym of Ostrya virginiana subsp. virginiana.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at the derived native crop resolution. The exposed tangential face fills the frame with broad cathedral grain and two small natural knots; no living plant, bark-only subject, furniture, or microscopy appears.
matchedCandidate.creator: Romeyn B. Hough; digitized by NCSU Libraries
